expectedClientBehavior: The shape rotated: adopt the replacement `electric-handle` from the 409 response headers, mark the shape for refetch, and re-request a fresh initial snapshot (offset=-1) with the new handle. Do NOT delete local rows eagerly — keep them visible until the refetched snapshot replaces them atomically. This is the common transport for must-refetch; the inline 200-status form in must-refetch.json is the rarer variant.
